articles.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
articles.description: Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic. Anthropic has agreed to spend $100 billion on AWS in return.
articles.author: Julie Bort

articles.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
articles.description: Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam. The company is rolling
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Tim Cook stepping down as Apple CEO, John Ternus taking over
articles.description: The transition has been expected for some time and ends one of the longer and more impactful runs a CEO has had at any company. Cook had inherited a
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Google Photos adds new touch-up tools for ‘quick’ fixes
articles.description: You can use the new tools to remove blemishes, refine skin texture, brighten eyes, or whiten teeth in photos.
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: It’s not just one thing — it’s another thing

articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: North Korean hackers blamed for $290M crypto theft
articles.description: The hack against Kelp DAO is the largest crypto heist of the year so far.
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Mastodon says its flagship server was hit by a DDoS attack
articles.description: The DDoS attack against Mastodon's flagship server comes less than a week after Bluesky was targeted with junk web traffic.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker, Sarah Perez

articles.title: FAA orders investigation into Blue Origin’s New Glenn mishap
articles.description: The New Glenn rocket will have to stay grounded while the company investigates what caused the apparent failure of its upper stage.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: NSA spies are reportedly using Anthropic’s Mythos, despite Pentagon feud
articles.description: NSA is said to be using Anthropic's restricted Mythos AI model.
articles.author: Rebecca Bellan

articles.title: WhatsApp is testing a premium subscription, but it is mainly cosmetic
articles.description: WhatsApp is testing a subscription after Meta debuted a similar subscription for Instagram earlier this year.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: CEO and CFO suddenly depart AI nuclear power upstart Fermi
articles.description: The startup, co-founded by former U.S. Energy Secretary Rick Perry, has faced headwinds with its AI campus in Texas.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Deezer says 44% of songs uploaded to its platform daily are AI-generated
articles.description: Deezer says consumption of AI-generated music on the platform is still very low, between 1% and 3% of the total streams, and 85% of these streams are
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: App host Vercel says it was hacked and customer data stolen
articles.description: Vercel blamed its breach on an earlier hack at Context AI, which allowed hackers to hijack a Vercel employee's account to steal customer data.
articles.author: Zack Whittaker

articles.title: Rivian’s factory hit by tornado ahead of R2 launch

articles.author: Sean O'Kane
